metricClaims.webvoyagerCurated30PassRate: If this number exceeds 40% (Gen 11 gpt-5.4 baseline) with ≤3 true capability failures, the current stack is at least on par with the Gen 25 era on real-web tasks. If the cost-cap failures flip to pass on a cap bump, the current stack is materially stronger — that's the next round's test.

shipped.gen30r3: WebVoyager curated-30 via Tangle router + claude-sonnet-4-6: 16/30 = 53.3% (Gen 11 baseline 12/30 = 40%). 12 of 14 failures are cost_cap_exceeded at 100k tokens. True capability failures: 3 (Amazon timeout, Google Flights x2 crash). Infra fix: scenario-track + webvoyager/run.mjs --provider/--base-url/--api-key forwarding (f25a3d2).
shipped.gen30r2: Tangle router unblocks measurement; Gen 29 cost −13% vs off (CI [−$0.060,−$0.017], d=-2.57 large). Infra fixes for multi-rep + mode-baseline.
shipped.gen30r1: bootstrap CI + Cohen's d verdict in scripts/lib/macro-promotion.mjs — closes audit B-H2
shipped.gen29: browser-harness integration — attach, portable domain-skill loader, custom macros, eval-gated promotion
shipped.gen27: stealth, anti-bot, form intelligence, CAPTCHA, card dedup, system Chrome
shipped.gen26b: site pattern learning from successful runs

gen30r3Metrics.dominantFailureMode: cost_cap_exceeded at 100k tokens (26-28 of ~29 cumulative failures)

webvoyagerBaseline.gen30r3_curated30: n=2 same-day: Run A 16/30 (53.3%) + Run B 15/30 (50.0%), mean 31/60 (51.7%), +11.7pp vs Gen 11 gpt-5.4 baseline — cost-cap-dominated, ~26-28 of ~29 cumulative failures are cost_cap_exceeded at 100k

criticalGap: Full WebVoyager 590 still pending. R3 found the blocker isn't the router (fixed) or the agent capability (6 sites at 2/2) but the cost cap interaction with claude-sonnet-4-6's verbosity. Next round: raise cap to 150k and re-run curated-30 to get a fair same-model pass rate before committing to full-590 budget.
